message.content:
For **west Houston facial spas**, the strongest options from the results are **Beautique Day Spa & Salon** in West University, **VIO Med Spa** in West U, and **Face Foundrie** in Houston, depending on whether you want a traditional spa facial or a more med-spa style treatment.[3][1][6]

- **Beautique Day Spa & Salon** — Located at **5520 Weslayan St., Houston, TX 77005** in West University, with facials and skincare services; it has been serving Houston for over 68 years.[3]
- **VIO Med Spa (West U)** — At **3849 Bellaire Blvd., Houston, TX 77025**, offering **facials**, skin rejuvenation, Botox, and fillers; useful if you want a clinical/med-spa facial experience.[1]
- **Face Foundrie** — A facial-focused spa in Houston with Sunday hours and a wide facial menu; good if you want a dedicated facial studio rather than a full-service day spa.[6]
- **Sanctuary Spa** — A long-running Houston day spa offering **award-winning facials** and skin care services, though it is in the Montrose/River Oaks area rather than deep west Houston.[2]
- **Milk + Honey Spa (River Oaks)** — A high-end spa offering **facials** and other wellness services, but it is closer to River Oaks than West Houston specifically.[4]

If you want the **best pick closest to west Houston**, **Beautique** is the most directly west-side option in the results.[3] If you want a more **medical-grade facial**, **VIO Med Spa** is the better fit.[1]

If you want, I can also narrow this down to:
- **best luxury facial**
- **best budget facial**
- **best acne/anti-aging facial**
- **closest to Katy, Memorial, or West University**
